category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for transforming and inspecting PDF files; official qpdf docs describe qpdf as a PDF document transformer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and ReadTheDocs title use qpdf; source_facts.name is qpdf.
docs_sources: Official qpdf ReadTheDocs is the published manual; official GitHub README says the manual is built with Sphinx and points to documentation.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe PDF transformation, inspection, command-line tools, and C++ library usage.
